title: for - counting a loop
author: Prodipta Acharjee
concept: A for loop counts through a range, running its body each pass.
explanation: i runs 1, 2, 3, 4; total collects them as it goes: 1, then 3, then 6, then 10.

exercises.question:
Which operator adds one to i after each pass?

for (int i = 0; i < 4; i_)
